actions.saveAsImageHint: Shares this badge as a picture. The credential may be lost when sent through messengers.

exportCaption: Export Verifiable Badge keeps the OpenBadge credential. Save as Image is just a picture — some apps strip the proof when sharing.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete Badge
deleteConfirm.message: This will permanently remove this badge. This cannot be undone.

deleteError.title: Couldn't delete badge
deleteError.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.
